/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o ../../bin/libllm_server_impl.dylib -install_name @rpath/libllm_server_impl.dylib CMakeFiles/llm_server_impl.dir/server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/llm_server_impl.dir/server_http.cpp.o CMakeFiles/llm_server_impl.dir/server_models.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/mac/lhm/build_check/bin -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib libserver_context.a ../../thirdparty/cpp-httplib/libcpp-httplib.a ../../common/libcommon.a ../../models/liblhm_models.a ../../models/chat/liblhm_chat.a ../../common/libcommon.a ../../models/liblhm_models.a ../../models/chat/liblhm_chat.a ../../thirdparty/cpp-httplib/libcpp-httplib.a -framework CFNetwork -framework CoreFoundation -framework Security -framework CFNetwork -framework CoreFoundation /opt/homebrew/lib/libbrotlicommon.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libbrotlienc.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libbrotlidec.dylib /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libz.tbd /opt/homebrew/lib/libzstd.1.5.7.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libssl.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libcrypto.dylib ../../thirdparty/gflags/libgflags_nothreads.a ../../bin/libspdlog.1.17.0.dylib ../../bin/libfmt.12.2.0.dylib ../../models/kvcache/liblhm_kvcache.a ../../models/memory/liblhm_memory.a ../../models/llm/liblhm_llm.a ../../models/loader/liblhm_loader.a ../../models/params/liblhm_params.a ../../bin/libggml.0.15.1.dylib ../../bin/libggml-cpu.0.15.1.dylib ../../bin/libggml-blas.0.15.1.dylib ../../bin/libggml-metal.0.15.1.dylib ../../bin/libggml-base.0.15.1.dylib
